feature/issue-58-integrate-coderlm-adapt.task_description: Improve River ML statusline indicator to use compact dot-style visual matching coderlm indicator pattern
feature/issue-58-integrate-coderlm-adapt.approach: Replace verbose River ML status text in nf-statusline.js with compact dot indicators (green for active, cyan for exploring, yellow for shadow recommendations) and sync to hooks/dist/nf-statusline.js.
out_of_scope: Modifying River ML algorithm logic or exploration thresholds
Adding new River ML configuration options
Creating new test files for River ML indicators
feature/issue-58-integrate-coderlm-adapt.risk_reason: Hook files in hooks/dist/ must be synced as part of this change, which is a guardrail trigger for medium/high risk; additionally, installer-adjacent changes combined with multiple file modifications across the statusline system elevate this to high risk.
